philosophy: My research is guided by a commitment to understanding how sustainable fashion can be made accessible, desirable, and culturally resonant for consumers. I work at the intersection of consumer behavior, design science, and textile innovation — using mixed-methods approaches to examine how sustainability is perceived, communicated, and adopted across diverse populations. I am particularly interested in natural and heritage fibers, zero-waste design, and the visual language of sustainable apparel.
